summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. No GitHub mutations planned. Security-sensitive refs are routed to central security handling; unrelated non-security PRs are classified independently because this shard has no shared canonical.

actions.reason: Third-party auth-provider catalog/security-boundary PR is explicitly security-sensitive in the preflight artifact and must be quarantined to central security handling.
The PR may be a valid narrow fix, but proof and technical correctness are unresolved; plan mode cannot repair or merge it.
Draft state plus failed proof leaves an explicit maintainer/proof decision; no close or merge action is justified.
The change is plausible but still lacks required proof; no duplicate/superseded/low-signal closeout is supported.
Related to already-landed Codex timeout work, but not proven duplicate or superseded from the artifact; dirty branch and dependency-guard failure block stronger action.
The PR is the linked candidate fix, but proof/check state requires maintainer judgment; no close or merge action is safe.
This is a plausible active fix path with contributor-credit trail, but maintainer review/merge decision is required and merge is blocked for this job.
The PR may be landable after maintainer proof/status reconciliation, but the artifact contains conflicting proof-status signals requiring human decision.
This is the active replacement fix path, but it needs maintainer review and check interpretation before any merge or fixed-by-candidate closeout.
The item is explicitly security-sensitive in the hydrated artifact and must be routed to central OpenClaw security handling.
Security-sensitive linked ref must be quarantined separately; this does not poison unrelated non-security PR classifications.
